result:
Iteration complete — experiment designed, pre-registered, and implemented. The harness can now train, score, and decide keep/revert.

**Experiment 10: Layout-aware field head** (category: architecture)

**Diagnosis.** Reviewing all nine experiments, one structural invariant survived every change: the 1024-cell probability-field head has only ever seen a spatially *averaged* (GAP) descriptor — a bag-of-textures that discards where anything sits within the crop. That single fact explains the joint evidence better than any hypothesis tried so far: 4.2× capacity was null (a deeper bag of textures is still a bag), contrastive descriptor learning was null (no training signal can make a descriptor discriminative once pooling has destroyed the discriminating information), 7.5× data recovered only 7%, and error medians are flat across lighting buckets (texture statistics are roughly equally ambiguous in every lighting). At 1 m/px, what distinguishes lookalike districts is the *arrangement* of roads, buildings, and open space — exactly the information GAP deletes. Exp 4 was the only non-GAP design, but it went to the opposite extreme (64 independent per-patch regressions, no global layout read), so a layout-aware global decision has never been tested.

**The one change** (`model/model.py` only): a 1×1 conv squeezes the 8×8×128 feature map to 8 channels; the flattened 512-d layout code is concatenated with the existing 128-d GAP vector; the logits FC becomes 640→1024 and reads both. Mathematically the head upgrades from a linear map on the spatial average to a low-rank linear map on the full feature map — a strict superset of the old head. Confidence head, soft-argmax decode, losses, and the entire training recipe are byte-identical to kept exp 7.

**Verified gates:** 755k params, ONNX 2.89 MiB (< 4 MiB), host latency proxy 0.60 ms (< 250 ms), and at init the output sits at the map center, so the downside stays bounded near the current 2.3 km as pre-registered. Known risk, stated in the registration: the layout code is rotation-sensitive while eval crops are rotated — mitigated by the ~6 independent random headings per training location and the retained rotation-invariant GAP path.

**Prediction:** if arrangement-blindness is the binding constraint, worst-case median drops clearly below 2326.54 m (plausibly 1,000–2,000 m, bright buckets first). A null would be decisive the other way — it would shift suspicion to the information content of the imagery itself, pointing the next iteration at pretrained texture features or lighting-specialist structure.

The pre-registration with eli5, stage list, and a reference-language architecture SVG (layout path drawn in red, frozen endpoints greyed) is in `runs/pending_experiment.json`.
